messages.content: Oh that's great! She can get cranky at other dogs when she first meets them. So we'd keep her very close to us and would totally keep her out of the dining room! Thanks so much!

Hey Cass! We are dog friendly we just ask that theyâre not in the dining room during normal dinner service. That being said Theo the golden retriever runs our trivia on thursdays so your sausage dog is welcome then too.

Hello! I've been told that The Oak is a lovely place to be. I just wanted to check what your policy on dogs is? I have a weird little dachsund that I take everywhere I go... Do you have a dog friendly beer garden? Or are they allowed inside? 
Thanks! 
Cass
